articles.headline: Apple unveils Gemini-powered Siri, delaying some EU rollout over regulation
articles.summary: Apple’s WWDC announcement signals a major shift in consumer and enterprise AI assistants, with Gemini handling more complex requests while Apple keeps some processing in-house. The EU delay highlights how regulation can slow feature rollout for multinational companies and affect planning for customer support, productivity, and device procurement.

articles.headline: TCS partners with Anthropic to help enterprises deploy AI at scale
articles.summary: TCS’s partnership with Anthropic is aimed at enterprise AI deployment, which is directly relevant to firms trying to move from pilots to production use cases. The announcement suggests growing demand for implementation partners that can adapt frontier models to business workflows, governance, and security requirements.

articles.headline: Anthropic shuts down Mythos access after U.S. order bars foreign nationals
articles.summary: Anthropic disabled access to its most advanced models, including Mythos, after a U.S. government order restricted the technology from foreign nationals. For businesses, this raises immediate compliance, procurement, and workforce-access questions for multinational teams using frontier AI tools.
